key.name: vendor
key.summary: Vendor to display (anthropic shows the 5h + weekly windows)

key.name: binary-path
key.summary: Absolute path to the ai-usagebar binary (empty = auto-detect on PATH / ~/.cargo/bin)

key.name: bar-width
key.summary: Width of each bar in cells

key.name: show-percent
key.summary: Show the numeric percentage next to each bar

key.name: panel-box
key.summary: Which panel area to live in (right = next to network/clock)

key.name: panel-index
key.summary: Position index within the chosen panel area

key.name: show-extra
key.summary: Show the extra-usage (cost) bar as a third bar

key.name: show-bars
key.summary: Draw the bars; when off, show only the percentages

key.name: color-empty
key.summary: Color of the empty part of the bar

key.name: panel-pools
key.summary: Which quota pools the panel shows (vendors with two independent pools only)
key.description: Combines with show-session/show-weekly: the panel draws one segment per selected pool per selected window. 'auto' shows the primary pool and falls back to an available secondary once the primary reaches the threshold.

key.name: panel-auto-threshold
key.summary: Usage percentage at which the 'auto' pool mode switches to the other pool
